original_abstract: *International Higher Education* (IHE) provides evidence-based commentary and sophisticated analysis on the critical trends transforming the global academic landscape. By focusing on the challenges and opportunities facing higher education systems and institutions worldwide, the journal serves as an essential resource for stakeholders seeking to navigate the complexities of the modern international sector.
humanized_abstract: IHE – International Higher Education IHE: International Higher Education offers informed analysis and thoughtful commentary on some of the key issues shaping higher education systems and institutions around the world. IHE is a must-read for scholars, researchers, policymakers, and practitioners seeking to understand developments in today’s international higher education field.
